title: Extract shared alias dictionaries to eliminate drift risk
description:
## Evidence
`IntentManager.cs` has two alias dictionaries (`BlueprintAliases` and `ItemAliases`) with a comment noting they're "also duplicated in ChatInterpreter.cs (fast-path)." When aliases change in one file, the other can drift.

## Impact
The LLM path (via IntentManager) and the fast-path (via ChatInterpreter) could resolve the same user request differently.

## Fix
Extract shared static alias dictionaries to a single location (e.g. `Agent.Core/Aliases.cs`) and reference from both consumers.

## Verification
Overlooked by all audits. See `Data/Pages/audits/msa-audit-verification-6-23.md` section O3.
